records.m_SubTitle_ENG:
<color=#ffd34c>혯hp혯hp혯hp</color>: She blocked that attack all by herself?
<color=#ffd34c>혯hp혯hp혯hp</color>: Official Counters really are amazing, lol.
<color=#ffd34c>혯hp혯hp혯hp혯hp</color>: Wait, isn't that the Jonie & Melonie representative?
<color=#ffd34c>혯hp혯hp혯hp</color>: Who's that?
<color=#ffd34c>혯hp혯hp혯hp혯hp</color>: A famous hotshot lawyer.
<color=#ffd34c>혯hp혯hp혯hp혯hp</color>: They say she can get anyone declared innocent if you pay enough.
<color=#ffd34c>혯hp혯hp혯hp혯hp</color>: Rumor has it she even turned down official certification from the Administration.
<color=#ffd34c>혯hp혯hp혯hp</color>: Whoa lol, then does that mean she's a Grade S Counter too?
